title: Minecraft Refreshed
description: A Vanilla+ Modpack focussed on Multiplayer and making the game feel new for already experienced Minecraft players!
body:
\ This Modpack aims to give a new experience while still making it feel like Minecraft! There is a big focus on Multiplayer and Exploration. # Issues This Modpack is still in Beta, expect issues! If you find any please report them on [my Website](https://minecraftrefreshed.framer.website/)! ### Found Issues: - Lagspikes the first few seconds after joining a signleplayer World - Medium priority - Chunks Fade in randomly breaking - Low priority - Inventory sometimes having pitch black background - Medium priority # Features: - Ingame VoiceChat - New World Generation + Structures - New Decoration Blocks - New Items to make the endgame last longer - Slight Performance Improvements - Better Visuals - QOL Patches - Play in VR ## Planned: - A more Vanilla feeling Minimap - Ingame hosting - A global guide/quest book because many mods are datapacks that dont add to REI # Q&A
Why does this Modpack ask to connect to a Server on launch? This is used because I use this Modpack on a Private SMP and this allows me to give Members of it special Features for it while still giving everyone else a normal experience. If you don't want the Pack connecting, you can Opt-Out in the Minecraft Options. This only loads a list of Usernames on launch, no data is shared or uploaded.
When will this Modpack go out of Beta? When it has all the Features I want to add for it.
Can I contribute to this Modpack? The only way to currently contribute is by reporting Issues. I do not currently plan on bringing this Modpack to GitHub.
What Mods are used?
